content: The Letters tab contains annual letters to partners and investors from 2012 to 2025 (14 letters total). Each letter is a PDF hosted on S3. Direct links: 2025: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2025.pdf, 2024: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2024.pdf, 2023: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2023.pdf, 2022: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2022.pdf, 2021: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2021.pdf, 2020: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2020.pdf, 2019: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2019.pdf, 2018: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2018.pdf, 2017: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2017.pdf, 2016: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2016.pdf, 2015: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2015.pdf, 2014: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2014.pdf, 2013: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2013.pdf, 2012: https://wyn-associates.s3.amazonaws.com/public/letters/2012.pdf. When a user asks for a specific year, include the direct PDF URL in the reply.
